def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    
    atr_window = params['atr_window']
    breakout_multiplier = params['breakout_multiplier']
    rsi_window = params['rsi_window']
    rsi_threshold = params['rsi_threshold']
    
    df['atr'] = ta.volatility.AverageTrueRange(df['high'], df['low'], df['close'], window=atr_window).average_true_range()
    df['upper_band'] = df['close'].shift(1) + (breakout_multiplier * df['atr'].shift(1))
    df['lower_band'] = df['close'].shift(1) - (breakout_multiplier * df['atr'].shift(1))
    df['rsi'] = ta.momentum.RSIIndicator(df['close'], window=rsi_window).rsi()
    
    signals = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    
    long_condition = (df['high'] > df['upper_band']) & (df['rsi'] < rsi_threshold)
    short_condition = (df['low'] < df['lower_band']) & (df['rsi'] > (100 - rsi_threshold))
    
    signals.loc[long_condition] = 1
    signals.loc[short_condition] = -1
    
    return signals.astype(int)
rationale: XAU/USD exhibits volatility breakout patterns where price tends to continue in the direction of the breakout when confirmed by RSI not being in overbought/oversold territory.
